text.title: Negative Result Discipline for ML Spikes Failure Modes

antipattern.symptom: Postmortem doc is 5 pages of prose.
antipattern.root-cause: Author treated it as a writeup.
antipattern.fix: Trim to three lines; move the prose to a linked appendix.

antipattern.symptom: Negative result lives in a person's notebook with no tag.
antipattern.fix: Apply tag from taxonomy; add to index.
Rewrite as a specific event ('when X library releases Y feature').
